sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 10

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 10:1
items.html: (to the question) Because the place of the Zivug [coupling] is at the third degree before them, and no Partzuf can receive except from the degree adjacent to it. (Item 6)
